'''Vuldo''' was a [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarban]] who was once involved in illegal [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] building. He had forced [[Q-E]], [[2-E]], and [[U-E]] to build the blasters for him. When the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] started to question his intentions, Vuldo shot U-E. He was eventually caught by [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[Nak Pitareeze]].

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1994) 5|''Droids'' (1994) 5]] {{1st}}
